content:
Hi Simona,
 
I want to drop in either Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday this week to complete my observation for onboarding. 
 
Do you have a preference?
 
Best,
Anthony 
 
Get Outlook for iOS

From: AnthonyJames PadavanoSent: Tuesday, February 18, 2025 10:48:01 AMTo: Simona Epuran &[REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS]>Subject: Classroom Observation Availability
 
Hi Simona,
I hope you’re doing well!
As part of my onboarding, I need to complete a classroom observation, and I was wondering if I could observe one of your classes. Based on my schedule, I’m available before noon or after 2:30 PM, Monday through Thursday. If you have any classes that would work within that timeframe, I’d love to coordinate a time that’s convenient for you.
Let me know what works best—looking forward to learning from your class!
Best, Anthony
 

---

 
 
From: 01.25 FDP300 New Faculty Training Program &[REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS]>Date: Tuesday, February 18, 2025 at 11:28 AMTo: AnthonyJames Padavano &[REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS]>Subject: Assignment Graded: New Employee Orientation Quiz, 01.25 FDP300 New Faculty Training Program
